attachment.content:
- find-skills: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.
- frontend-design: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, or applications. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.
- playwright-cli: Automates browser interactions for web testing, form filling, screenshots, and data extraction. Use when the user needs to navigate websites, interact with web pages, fill forms, take screenshots, test web applications, or extract information from web pages.
- reviewing-code: ベースブランチに対する変更差分をもとにコードレビューを実施します。ベースブランチを指示として含めることができます。含めない場合は main をベースブランチとしてレビューを行います。レビューを依頼されたら必ず使用する
- pr: GitHub の Pull Request を自動作成するスキル。 「PR を作って」「プルリクを作成して」「PR を出して」「レビュー依頼したい」など、 PR 作成・提出に関する指示があれば必ずこのスキルを使用すること。 GitHub Issues からチケットの内容を取得し、git log でベースブランチを特定、 git diff からコンテキストを把握した上で、所定のテンプレートを使って develop ブランチへの PR を作成する。
- searching-library-reference: Context7 API を利用して外部ライブラリのAPIドキュメントとコードスニペットを検索・取得します。外部ライブラリの使用方法を調べる際に必ず使用します。
- commit: git のステージの内容を元にコミットを行います
- supabase:supabase-postgres-best-practices: Postgres performance optimization and best practices from Supabase. Use this skill when writing, reviewing, or optimizing Postgres queries, schema designs, or database configurations.
- supabase:supabase: Use when doing ANY task involving Supabase. Triggers: Supabase products (Database, Auth, Edge Functions, Realtime, Storage, Vectors, Cron, Queues); client libraries and SSR integrations (supabase-js, @supabase/ssr) in Next.js, React, SvelteKit, Astro, Remix; auth issues (login, logout, sessions, JWT, cookies, getSession, getUser, getClaims, RLS); Supabase CLI or MCP server; schema changes, migrations, security audits, Postgres extensions (pg_graphql, pg_cron, pg_vector).
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

{
	"devDependencies": {
		"@biomejs/biome": "catalog:",
		"cspell": "catalog:",
		"knip": "catalog:"
	},
	"packageManager": "pnpm@10.12.4",
	"scripts": {
		"build": "pnpm --filter @workspace/supabase supabase:start && pnpm --filter web build",
		"db:generate": "pnpm --filter @workspace/db db:generate",
		"db:migrate": "pnpm --filter @workspace/db db:migrate",
		"db:reset": "pnpm --filter @workspace/db db:reset",
		"db:seed": "pnpm --filter @workspace/db db:seed",
		"dev": "pnpm --filter @workspace/supabase supabase:start && pnpm --filter web dev",
		"start": "pnpm --filter @workspace/supabase supabase:start && pnpm --filter web start",
		"supabase:seed": "pnpm --filter @repo/supabase supabase:seed",
		"supabase:start": "pnpm --filter @repo/supabase supabase:start",
		"supabase:stop": "pnpm --filter @repo/supabase supabase:stop",
		"test:browser": "pnpm --filter web test:browser",
		"test:e2e": "pnpm --filter web test:e2e",
		"test:server": "pnpm --filter web test:server",
		"validate:check": "biome check . && DATABASE_URL=postgres://dummy:dummy@localhost:5432/dummy knip && cspell . && pnpm -r type:check",
		"validate:fix": "biome check --write . && DATABASE_URL=postgres://dummy:dummy@localhost:5432/dummy knip --fix --allow-remove-files"
	}
}

content.text:
はい、可能です。vitest 4.1.5 は vite ^6 || ^7 || ^8 に対応しており、vite 8.0.13 が最新。plugin-react 6 が要求する vite ^8 を入れれば解決します。

ただし vite はカタログにないので、`overrides` で vite を 8 に固定するのが簡単です。

content.text:
cspell が落ちているのは Node バージョン (22.14.0 < 22.18.0) の問題で、修正対象とは別件です。元のエラーは解決しました。

**修正内容**
- `pnpm-workspace.yaml`: vite 8.0.13 をカタログに追加
- `apps/web/package.json`: vite を devDependencies に追加（`catalog:` 参照）

**結果**
- `vitest.config.ts` の `Package subpath './internal' is not defined` エラー → 解消
- 37 個の Unused files（テストファイル群）→ 解消
- Unused devDependencies (msw, vitest-browser-react) → 解消
- knip は exit 0 で通過（残る Configuration hints 7 件は情報レベル）

原因は dependabot の dev-tools group bump で `@vitejs/plugin-react` が 6.0.1 に上がったが、vitest 4.1.5 の transitive な vite が 7.2.6 のまま固定されていたため。plugin-react 6 が要求する `vite/internal` export は vite 8 で追加されたものでした。

name: Browser Test

on:
  pull_request:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

concurrency:
  group: small-browser-test-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

env:
  APP_NAME: FORMAWORK.AI
  SERVICE_NAME: web
  SUPABASE_URL: http://127.0.0.1:62021
  SUPABASE_ANON_KEY: REDACTED
  SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY: REDACTED
  NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL: http://127.0.0.1:62021
  NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY: REDACTED
  DATABASE_URL: postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:62022/postgres

jobs:
  browser-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10

    steps:
      - name: リポジトリのチェックアウト
        uses: actions/checkout@v6

      - name: pnpm のセットアップ
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v6

      - name: Node.js のセットアップ
        uses: actions/setup-node@v6
        with:
          node-version-file: .node-version
          cache: pnpm

      - name: 依存関係のインストール
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Playwright ブラウザのインストール
        run: pnpm --filter web exec playwright install --with-deps chromium

        # 初回実行時に必ず new dependencies optimized: が発生しエラーが出るため一回目はエラーで落とす前提（暫定対策）
        # vitest 設定の optimizeDeps.include を指定しても回避できないため
      - name: "エラー対策：[vitest] Vite unexpectedly reloaded a test"
        run: pnpm test:browser
        continue-on-error: true

        # ２回目のエラーは本当のエラー
      - name: ブラウザテストの実行
        run: pnpm test:browser

      - name: テスト結果のアップロード
        if: failure()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
        with:

name: 静的解析

on:
  pull_request:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

concurrency:
  group: static-analytics-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

env:
  APP_NAME: FORMAWORK.AI
  SERVICE_NAME: web
  SUPABASE_URL: http://127.0.0.1:62021
  SUPABASE_ANON_KEY: REDACTED
  SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY: REDACTED
  NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL: http://127.0.0.1:62021
  NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY: REDACTED
  DATABASE_URL: postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:62022/postgres

jobs:
  lint:
    name: Lint と Format のチェック
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10

    steps:
      - name: コードをチェックアウト
        uses: actions/checkout@v6

      - name: pnpm をインストール
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v6

      - name: Node.js をセットアップ
        uses: actions/setup-node@v6
        with:
          node-version-file: ".node-version"
          cache: "pnpm"

      - name: 依存関係をインストール
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Supabase CLI のセットアップ
        uses: supabase/setup-cli@v2
        with:
          version: latest

      - name: Supabase の起動
        run: |
          pnpm -w supabase:start && pnpm -w supabase:seed
      - name: データベースリセット
        run: pnpm -w db:reset

      - name: バリデーションチェック
        run: pnpm validate:check

content.text:
commit `19d2468` を push しました。

**修正内容**
- `packages/db/tsconfig.json`: `types: ["node"]` を追加（TS 6 で `@types/node` の自動取り込みが効かなくなった）
- `packages/ui/tsconfig.json`, `apps/web/tsconfig.json`: TS 6 で deprecated になった `baseUrl` を削除（`paths` は tsconfig 基準で解決される）

`pnpm -r type:check` ローカルで全パッケージ通過を確認済みです。
